name: Potato-Apple Torten
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Core and thinly slice the apples; thinly slice the potatoes.
3. Heat oil in a large, cast-iron skillet over medium heat until hot.
4. Carefully place a layer of potatoes in a spiral fashion on the bottom of the skillet, using half the potatoes.
5. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and half the chopped onion.
6. Place a layer of apple slices evenly on top.
7. Repeat the layering process, alternating between potatoes and apples.
8. Grate some nutmeg over the top and press the mixture down gently with a plate.
9. Remove the plate and bake in the preheated oven for 35 to 40 minutes, or until the apples are tender and the potatoes are crisp and brown.
10. Allow the torten to cool for 10 minutes before cutting into wedges to serve.
